scope: champion_clothing production loader, S08 authority switch, and cache lifecycle

producer_contract.class_contract: exact ordered material-v1 vocabulary for IDs 0..15, including none_background
producer_contract.output: S08/material_draft.png as an 8-bit indexed ontology map
validation: hash-verified checkpoint and inference configuration through the production MMSeg loader
zero prediction authority outside the promoted-person silhouette
producer_contract.gpu_lifecycle: MMSeg slot closes in finally after success or prediction-contract refusal

pipeline_contract.promotion_cache: missing or fallback S08 evidence forces S08
pipeline_contract.role_change_cache: model key, checkpoint, inference config, or vocabulary changes force S08
pipeline_contract.rollback_cache: removing the champion role forces S08 when cached evidence names champion_clothing
pipeline_contract.partial_run_scope: S08 is forced only when the selected run includes S08

current_live_registry.interpretation: the existing SCHP/Sapiens/GDINO/SAM2 pipeline remains primary until a governed clothing winner is promoted

not_claimed: No trained clothing champion, D6/G7 score, or live material-model inference is claimed; MF-P5-04.02 remains open.
